title: Accessory Gift
description: Redeem for a member-only accessory that completes a look. Designed to drive add-on behavior and higher average order value.

title: Alteration Credit
description: Free basic alteration credit that increases confidence to buy. A premium-feel perk that reduces returns and builds trust.

title: VIP Styling Session
description: A mini styling session that turns shopping into an experience. Perfect for launches, seasonal refreshes, and high-value members.

title: Exclusive Drop Access
description: Early access to a new collection that creates urgency and excitement. Built for capsule drops and collaborations.

title: Shopping Credit
description: A flexible store credit reward that feels meaningful and drives return visits. Best used as a milestone redemption.

title: Free Shipping Token
description: Free shipping perk that removes purchase friction and lifts conversion. Great for online-first members and seasonal campaigns.
